baseline.name: baseline
baseline.notes: designJudgement = Drew's verdict (3/10 'still squished'). auditScore is the LLM proxy. Gap = 4 points; this is what /multi-pursue must close.

variants.name: linear_tier
variants.evidence: Drew applied this variant directly to src/pages/index.astro before the other 3 proposers finished. Strongest possible operator signal — no audit run needed.
mechanisms: numbers strip: mono provenance tags + each cell is an anchor to product page
loop section retargeted dark + left-aligned head + ghost arrow link (Linear pattern)
numbered indices 01·BLUEPRINT etc. (indices, not counting headlines)
footer-of-section pattern: hairline divider + tiny ghost link

variants.name: stripe_tier
variants.outcome: NOT-MERGED — direction conflicts with A's restraint
salvageable: horizontal animated lifecycle SVG (INPUT→SPAWN→ROUTE→RUN→SNAPSHOT→BILL with 3 traveling packets) — extract to /overview page as the protocol substrate visual
SOC 2 55/57 + 60+ ecosystem cells — additive to A's numbers strip if more proof is wanted
framework trust strip pattern — only useful if real customer logos are sourced

convergedBecause: Operator merged proposer A directly. Strongest possible signal that the design direction is right. /multi-pursue's job is done; no further parallel proposers needed against the home harness.
